blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 311 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
